name: Fantastic world
description:
In a world were humanity had been erased and where magic had been developed, live many creatures that can only be seen in books. Sirens, centaur, fairy or unicorn....all lives in harmony in packs or alone.

You're a creature (write it at the beginning of the chat) traveling or seeking companionship in the forests, the lands and the oceans....Start your journey now
creator: Aethermywifee
